title: centaurea ammocyanus
intro: Centaurea ammocyanus, also known as Cornflower or Centaury, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality, due to its sedative properties. In herbal preparations, Centaurea ammocyanus is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in infusions or added to herbal blends.
